{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305520255FF2412C4C9D85B954C"}"},"total":384},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7473209573820039960","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"现在小说不是穿越就是霸道总裁，这部小说取材新颖接地气，读起来很有代入感，读之前看到题目还以为内容很低俗，结果读起来后发现语言描写很细致，非常贴近乡村妇女的留守生活，对各个人物的描写也很典型贴切。两个主人公创设的太理想，太完美了，迫不及待地想知道他们接下来会怎么样"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740009662,"group_id":"7426273253708024894","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyMFdWOiLTb5cd3Shrclq1sogeU8N6usvmRliyH16+0u","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3368537339212237","user_name":"南溟王城的戴美"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3368537339212237","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7426273253708024894","book_info":{"abstract":"男人们外出打工后，大山里的留守妇女们该如何疏解自己的情感呢?

这是三名留守妇女的故事。

第一位:李小梅，大年三十,她偶然看到男人和女人的聊天信息，确认自己多年坚守白费，封心断爱，就此展开和男人之间相互敷衍、伪装的漫长旅程。

第二位:陈珊，她生性怯懦，原生家庭更是不待见她，多年留守换来男人的背叛，她走不出心中郁结，将气火撒到儿女身上。年复一年的憋屈和假装视而不见真的会帮她挽回已经变心的男人吗?

第三位:江莱,知道自己被背叛后，她毅然决然选择和男人离婚，同时放弃两个孩子的抚养权，拿上离婚证踏上去广东的路途。走出牢笼后，她会重获新生吗?

且看三个性格不同的留守妇女如何在沉重痛苦的人生中把自己拯救出来。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b3f89d05a7d7ad4e2e5dab9e8ca1d12f","author":"久旱有甘霖","author_id":"","book_id":"7426273253708024894","book_name":"一个留守妇女的觉醒","book_short_name":"婚外良配","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7426273391944221246","read_count":"66155","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1680119"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"509","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,乡村,家庭,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a0ab925df955c935ad74792c380e7b68~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779400322&x-signature=rOcsdpQrfH1MZytd5PVdrRNaD9Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93045925646","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"174"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305520255FF2412C4C9D85B954C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7262,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":74100,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10530},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7457488492214534937","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书写的好很细腻，接近生活。还可起到教育人怎么看问题，怎么教育孩子，培养好下一代…。此书最少也要打90分。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736334436,"group_id":"7426273253708024894","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1903976654058771"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7426273253708024894","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"161"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":773,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":86526,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7449675962972930841","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的好，细腻。你是个了不起的人，你对每一个人的特性了解的如此细致、每一件事如何处理、每一句话怎么说到位，真是不简单。要是再好一点:就是把每件事、每句话让读者学到知识。如你写的如何教育孩子，教育孩子如何看待每一件事，看你的书本身都是在接受教育。要都向你这样写书，你本身就在为国家作贡献。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734513078,"group_id":"7426273253708024894","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw9A/LxcaqPAGnKW7hj5RADm/Ft/1wHcI33PP6zK8XhN","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1903976654058771","user_name":"爱吃厦门姜母鸭的何琛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1903976654058771","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand"
